vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be the most trusted and comprehensive partner for international students pursuing education in Japan, fostering global connections and cultural exchange.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To provide exceptional guidance and support services that make studying in Japan accessible, affordable, and life-changing for students worldwide.

values.title: Our Values
values.description: Integrity, excellence, cultural sensitivity, and unwavering commitment to student success guide everything we do.

hero.title: Your Journey to
hero.subtitle: Japan Begins Here
hero.description: Nihon Moments is your trusted partner in making your dream of studying in Japan a reality. We guide you through every step of the journey, from application to arrival, with personalized support and expert guidance.

services.title: Our Core Services
services.subtitle: We make the process of studying in Japan smooth and stress-free, providing comprehensive support at every stage of your journey.

support.title: Why Choose Nihon Moments?
support.subtitle: We're not just consultants; we're your partners in success. Our comprehensive approach ensures you have everything you need to thrive in Japan.

personalized.title: Personalized Approach
personalized.description: Every student receives individual attention tailored to their unique goals and circumstances. Our dedicated counselors work closely with you to create a personalized roadmap to success.

proven.title: Proven Success
proven.description: Join hundreds of successful students who have achieved their dreams through our guidance. Their stories inspire us and prove that with the right support, anything is possible.

localNetwork.title: Strong Local Network
localNetwork.description: Our established partnerships with Japanese institutions and local contacts ensure you have support even before you arrive in Japan. You're never alone in this journey.

students.title: Meet Our Successful Students
students.subtitle: COE approved students now studying at top Japanese universities

testimonial.quote: Nihon Moments didn't just help me with paperwork – they helped me build my future. The personalized guidance and constant support made all the difference.
testimonial.name: Yuki Sato

whyChoose.title: Why Students Choose Us
whyChoose.subtitle: Our commitment to excellence and personalized care sets us apart from the rest.

expertise.title: Expert Guidance
expertise.description: Individual guidance tailored to your unique goals and dreams

success.title: Proven Success
success.description: Hundreds of students successfully placed in top Japanese institutions

partnerships.title: Local Partnerships
partnerships.description: Strong network of contacts and partnerships throughout Japan

community.title: Welcoming Community
community.description: Join a supportive community of fellow students and alumni

statistics.title: Our Success in Numbers
statistics.subtitle: Track our growing community and exceptional success rates in helping students achieve their Japanese education dreams
statistics.enrollmentSubtitle: Annual growth of students joining our agency

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Japanese Journey?
cta.subtitle: Take the first step towards your dream of studying in Japan. Our team is ready to guide you through every step of the process.

intake.title: Academic Intake Periods
intake.subtitle: Plan your studies in Japan with our four intake periods throughout the year. Each intake has specific requirements and timelines to help you prepare effectively.

january.description: Start your academic year with the main intake. Perfect for students who want to begin their studies at the traditional Japanese academic calendar start.

april.description: Spring intake offering a fresh start. Ideal for students who prefer to begin their studies during the beautiful cherry blossom season.

july.description: Summer intake for students who want to start mid-year. Great opportunity to join ongoing programs and catch up with the academic schedule.

october.description: Fall intake providing flexibility for students who need more time to prepare. Perfect for those who want to start in the autumn semester.

requirements.title: JLPT Requirements
requirements.january: Minimum JLPT N3 level required for January intake due to higher academic demands.
requirements.other: JLPT N5 level sufficient for April, July, and October intakes.
